title: Vickerman
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Vickerman''' was a term used by at least one [[Mimbanite]] beggar to address miners when soliciting them for [[Alcohol/Legends|alcoholic]] beverages.

==Behind the scenes==
Considering that the Mimbanite beggar spoke with a lisp, it is possible that the beggar may have intended to address the miner in some approximation of "liquor man."

==Appearances==
*''[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Splinter of the Mind's Eye 1|''Splinter of the Mind's Eye'' 1]]

[[Category:Slang]]
